notes: The source page references the Masthead as a reservation campaign format available under 'YouTube reach, views, and engagements' objective, described as driving 'mass reach and awareness with a prominent ad placement on YouTube and Google TV.' Full technical specifications are not detailed in this page; a dedicated spec page is referenced at https://support.google.com/google-ads/answer/9709826 and https://support.google.com/google-ads/answer/14117675. The Masthead is booked via reservation (fixed CPM) and requires activation through a Google Representative.
